info.name: MusicSheet Viewer
info.description:
Visualize and play music sheets of various formats
- .mscz | MuseScore - .mxl, .musicxml | MusicXML - .midi | MIDI (currently not supported due to a bug in WebMscore) - .gp, .gpx, ... | GuitarPro - and many more, if [MuseScore supports them](https://musescore.org/en/handbook/3/file-formats#share-with-other-software).
info.author: Augustin64
